description: Off Broadstreet is a live theater company on Commercial Street in Nevada City. Its stage productions come with desserts and beverages as part of the evening.
Beads Galore is a bead shop on Sutton Way in Grass Valley, part of the county's community of shops and makers.
Grateful Ink is a tattoo studio on Spring Street in Nevada City, one of the town's working art studios.
Nevada City Picture Framing & Gallery is a picture-framing shop and gallery on Searls Avenue in Nevada City.
Sierra Rose Alpacas is an alpaca farm and studio on Greenhorn Road in Grass Valley.
Golden Road Radio and Television is a radio and television outfit on New Mohawk Road in Nevada City, listed among the county's cultural resources.
KYRR 93.3 FM is a radio station based on Barn Hollow Road in Nevada City.
Nevada Union High School Library is the campus library at Nevada Union High School on Ridge Road in Grass Valley.
Sound Check Music buys, sells, and trades used musical gear on Maltman Drive in Grass Valley — 'amps, guitars, bass guitars' and effects — and offers 'amp, guitar, and band instrument repair.'

YubaNet is an independent regional news site — 'We Deliver News to the Sierra' — covering Nevada County and beyond with fire news, environmental reporting, and community coverage from its Nevada City base.
MIX decor + design is a decor and design studio on Argall Way in Nevada City.

Wolf Craft School teaches traditional crafts in Nevada City, with workshops spanning ceramics, fiber arts, natural dyeing, shoemaking, and jewelry making. It describes itself as 'a creative hub offering hands-on workshops and classes that reconnect people with the timeless art of making.'
Asylum Down is a shop at 300 Broad Street in Nevada City, part of the county's roster of shops and makers.
Crush is a shop at 211 Broad Street in Nevada City, counted among the town's independent shops and makers.
Earth Central is a shop at 417 Broad Street in Nevada City, one of the storefronts in the town's shops-and-makers listings.

Foothill Mercantile is a family-owned store on Mill Street in Grass Valley, in business since 1976. Its shelves carry some 23,000 items — 'toys, puzzles, stuffed animals, candy, gifts, housewares, greeting cards, holiday items, and much more.'
Heart and Home is a home-goods shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley.
Kiya's Naturals is a natural-goods shop on Commercial Street in Nevada City.
Lola and Jack is a shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley, one of the storefronts in the town's shops-and-makers scene.
Marley Lane is a shop on West Main Street in Grass Valley, among the independent shops and makers on the map.
Native Wren is a shop at 125 Mill Street in Grass Valley, part of the street's cluster of independent shops.
Of Earth and Salt is a clothing shop on Searls Avenue in Nevada City focused on 'Slow Fashion + Ethically Made' apparel, from ice-dyed hemp pieces to jewelry and home goods.
The Earth Store is a shop at 310 Broad Street in Nevada City, listed among the town's shops and makers.
Two Little Birds is a children's boutique on Commercial Street in Nevada City, stocking toys, books, and clothing 'hand selected with so much care and attention for the planet and our children.'
Mystic Theater is a performing arts venue at 240 Commercial Street in Nevada City.
Kodo Arts is a Japanese art and antiques dealer on Searls Avenue in Nevada City, offering 'treasures, the unusual and something for every budget and taste.'

Nevada County Arts Council is the county's community arts hub and a State-Local Partner with the California Arts Council, working to 'promote and sustain the visual, literary and performing arts of Nevada County.' Its Truckee office anchors the Truckee Cultural District.

Rock Cellar Records sells new, used, and collectible vinyl from the basement of Word After Word Books in 'Historic Downtown Truckee,' along with record players and 'a growing collection of books about music and musicians.'
Cornerstone Bakery & Kitchen is a bakery on West River Street in Truckee.
Art Truckee is a gallery and community space on Donner Pass Road, showing and selling work by local and regional artists in the gallery and through its online shop.

Truckee Tahoe Airport doubles as an exhibition space: its 'Art at the Airport' program, managed by the Truckee Cultural District, showcases 'over 100 artists annually' in rotating exhibitions, and displayed works are available for purchase.
Good Anya Plant Shop is a plant shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
Marilyn's Catwalk is a shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, among the storefronts along the road.
Tahoe-Truckee T-Shirtery is a T-shirt shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
ela chapman is a shop at 10056 Donner Pass Road in Truckee, listed among the area's shops and makers.
Liberty Bell Smart Home is a smart-home shop at 10072 Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
Unique Boutique is a boutique shop on West River Street in Truckee.
